owner.evidence: Exact-hash owner/model review verified the corrected IMG_7523–7614 Betsson and IMG_7615–7745 Betano boundary, 12 current Betsson singles totaling S/95 with maximum S/14, a sourced S/5 accumulator, forced-coverage warnings, Betano S/100 reserve, previous-day elapsed-result folding, complementary/dutching math separated from non-guaranteed two-outcome hedges, research-only double-discount margin-of-safety gates, BLOCKED promotion, null recommendations, and zero authorized stakes.

replication_1.evidence: Two isolated clean-room builds matched exact prediction/metrics hashes and all 756 corrected app labels; Betsson reproduced 12 positive singles totaling S/95 with maximum S/14 plus an S/5 accumulator, previous-day fixtures remained archived, complementary 1X2 inverse-sum analysis and double-discount probability thresholds were deterministic, while Betano reserved S/100 and authorized stakes remained zero.

replication_2.evidence: Data/statistics review visually confirmed the sportsbook boundary and all 756 corrected source rows, verified one sourced single per current Betsson fixture, the 15% single and 5% accumulator caps, explicit forced-coverage/stale-price warnings, 1X2 dutching/arbitrage requires inverse odds below 1, two-outcome hedges disclose uncovered-outcome loss, double-discount gates compare market implied probability to half of model decision probability, no invented Betano prices, and no validated-profit claim.

editor.evidence: Editor/UI review verified JSON-driven profile totals, dynamically scaled per-app headers/reserves, 12 current Betsson singles, three localized ranked comparisons, localized three-leg accumulator with all-legs and gross-not-profit warnings, bilingual Betano missing-data request, complementary/dutching panel with no-guarantee disclosure, double-discount UI with research-only non-authorization disclosure, forced-coverage warnings, mobile flow, and permanent authorized S/0 safeguards.
